name: kavio
description: JSON-first programmable video engine for automation, AI templates, and future visual editing.

scripts.install:render-binaries: corepack pnpm run install:render-ffmpeg && corepack pnpm run install:render-browsers
scripts.pack:dry: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run verify:render-optional-deps && corepack pnpm run verify:package-metadata && corepack pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' pack --dry-run
scripts.release:check: corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm run pack:dry
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-schema test && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-core test && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-browser-renderer test && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-render-worker test && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-ffmpeg test && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-render test && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-react test && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-builder test && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-cli test && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-mcp test && corepack pnpm run verify:package-metadata && corepack pnpm run verify:site && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-example-basic-builder run build && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-example-basic-builder run emit > /tmp/kavio-basic-builder.json && diff -u examples/basic-json/composition.json /tmp/kavio-basic-builder.json && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-example-mvp-demo run build && corepack pnpm --filter @kitsra/kavio-example-mvp-demo run validate
